subject: Thank you for reaching out
body:
Thank you for your inquiry

I appreciate you taking the time to reach out.

This confirms I've received your inquiry. I review all private inquiries personally and respond within 2-3 business days.

In the meantime, here's what you should know about how I work:

  • Trauma-informed systems strategy — Most leadership dysfunction is physiological, not strategic. I work at that intersection.
  • Clinical precision — Board-certified physician perspective applied to performance challenges.
  • The E3 Method™ — Elevate, Embody, Evolve. A three-phase framework for sustained leadership coherence.

I look forward to connecting soon.

Dr. Negin Rajaipour, MD
Board-Certified Family Medicine
Founder, VitaRegen Medical™

subject: Why high performers burn out (and how to prevent it)
body:
Why high performers burn out

Most high performers I work with share a common pattern:

They can strategize their way out of any problem — except the one living in their nervous system.

The burnout cycle doesn't start with too many meetings or poor boundaries. It starts with unresolved physiological dysregulation that compounds over years.

Three warning signs:

  1. You can think through problems intellectually, but your body still holds the stress
  2. Sleep suffers even when the schedule clears
  3. Recovery doesn't happen during downtime

This isn't about working less. It's about addressing the root cause: a nervous system that never learned to downregulate.

That's where The E3 Method™ comes in — a clinical framework for sustained performance without burnout.

More on that next time.

Dr. Negin Rajaipour

subject: A trauma-informed system for sustainable performance
body:
The E3 Method™

Here's what most leadership frameworks miss:

Your nervous system is the infrastructure beneath every decision you make.

When that infrastructure is dysregulated, no amount of strategy, willpower, or productivity hacks will fix it.

The E3 Method™ addresses performance at three levels:

1. Elevate
Surface the underlying patterns beneath presenting challenges. What looks like procrastination is often freeze response. What feels like lack of focus is often hypervigilance.

2. Embody
Translate insights into structural changes. This isn't theory — it's about building new physiological baselines through actionable protocols.

3. Evolve
Anchor shifts at the identity level. Behavior change without identity shift doesn't last.

This is the framework I use with private clients, healthcare founders, and physician leaders.

It's clinical. It's precise. And it works.

Dr. Negin Rajaipour

subject: From burnout to breakthrough: A physician's story
body:
My story

I didn't start in entrepreneurship. I started in the U.S. Navy.

Before medical school. Before residency. Before I knew what leadership even meant.

What I learned there:

  • How to operate under pressure
  • How to lead when exhausted
  • How dysregulation compounds when you ignore it

By the time I finished residency at Eisenhower Medical Center and built VitaRegen Medical™, I had lived both sides: the high performer who powers through, and the clinician who understands the cost.

That's why my approach is different.

I don't teach resilience from theory. I teach it from lived experience + clinical training + systems strategy.

If you're ready to have that conversation, reply to this email.

Dr. Negin Rajaipour, MD
Board-Certified Family Medicine
U.S. Navy Veteran
Founder, VitaRegen Medical™

subject: Why I co-authored this book with Brian Tracy
body:
The Resurrection Algorithm™

Earlier this year, I co-authored The Resurrection Algorithm™ with Brian Tracy and Medhat Zaki.

It became an Amazon #1 International Bestseller.

The book is about what happens after everything falls apart — and how to rebuild from that edge.

It's personal. It's clinical. And it reflects the core of what I teach:

You don't go back to who you were before. You rebuild into someone new.

If that resonates, you can find it on Amazon. But more importantly — if you're at that edge right now, let's talk.

Reply to this email or submit a private inquiry.

Dr. Negin Rajaipour

subject: What working together looks like
body:
